title: Ubiquiti UniFi switch USW-Pro-Max-48-PoE
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Switches / PoE Switches
description: The Ubiquiti USW-Pro-Max-48-PoE is a 48-port PoE switch with L3 feature support. It offers 16x 2.5Gb ports , where 8 ports support POE++ up to 60W per port, and an additional 8 ports support POE+ up to 30W per port. Additionally, there are 32x 1Gb ports , with 8 POE++ up to 60W per port, and the remaining 24 ports POE+ up to 30W per port. The total PoE budget for the switch is 720W . The switch is equipped with 4x SFP+ ports and is ready for redundant power supply using the Ubiquiti UniFi… 16x 2.5Gb PoE ports (8x POE++ and 8x POE+) 32x 1Gb PoE ports (8x POE++ and 24x POE+) 4x SFP+ ports Total PoE budget: 720W Redundant power supply option Switch Power cord Rackmount ears for 19" rack
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (16) 100/1000/2500Mbps + (32) 10/100/1000Mbps Optical interfaces (4) 100G Other features Touchscreen Power Power type Mains power (230V) PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at, 802.3bt Redundant power supply Yes PoE Out ports 48 PoE budget [W] 720 Physical characteristics Design Rackmount Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Width [mm] 443 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 400 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 112
